# Spec: generate-sbom.md §Command Structure, §Artifact Metadata
# Covers: `sbomasm generate config` produces a loadable template YAML.

exec sbomasm generate config
cp stdout .artifact-metadata.yaml

# Sanity: YAML contains the two top-level blocks mentioned in the spec.
grep 'app:' .artifact-metadata.yaml
grep 'output:' .artifact-metadata.yaml
grep 'primary_purpose' .artifact-metadata.yaml

# The template has [REQUIRED]/[OPTIONAL] tokens per the implementation. The
# generator should REJECT a config with unresolved [REQUIRED] tokens.
! exec sbomasm generate sbom -c .artifact-metadata.yaml -i .components.json -o out.json
stderr 'required|invalid'

# Replace tokens with real values and try again
cp good.yaml .artifact-metadata.yaml
exec sbomasm generate sbom -c .artifact-metadata.yaml -i .components.json -o out.json
exec jq -e '.metadata.component.name == "foo"' out.json

-- .components.json --
{
  "schema": "interlynk/component-manifest/v1",
  "components": [
    { "name": "x", "version": "1.0.0", "type": "library", "license": "MIT",
      "supplier": {"name":"a"},
      "external_references": [{"type":"distribution","url":"https://x"}],
      "hashes":[{"algorithm":"SHA-256","value":"1111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111"}] }
  ]
}
-- good.yaml --
app:
  name: foo
  version: 1.0.0
  primary_purpose: application
  supplier:
    name: Acme
  license:
    id: MIT
